Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AssetActionSource

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AssetActionSource
public class AssetActionSource extends SObject

Java class for AssetActionSource complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AssetActionSource">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActualTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetAction" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}AssetAction" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetActionId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetActionSourceNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EstimatedTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalReferenceDataSource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProductAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Quantity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReferenceEntityItem" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReferenceEntityItemId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subtotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TransactionDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
